selected_issues.title: [billwatch] Affiliate tracking endpoint — energy provider + solar referral click tracking
selected_issues.reason: P0 — NEWLY UNBLOCKED. #274 (DB schema) merged as PR #354 last cycle. BillWatch now has tables for bills, utility accounts, households, anomalies, benchmarks. This issue builds the affiliate click tracking endpoint — same pattern as ScoreRebound's /api/affiliate/click (PR #321). Without click tracking, zero billwatch affiliate revenue is measurable. Revenue chain: user uploads bill → anomaly detected → provider switching CTA or solar recommendation → affiliate click tracked → commission. Gates ALL billwatch revenue (#334 provider DB, #335 solar recs). Well-scoped API endpoint work.

selected_issues.title: [cellscore] Plan database seed — 60+ plans from 15+ carriers with affiliate URLs
selected_issues.reason: P0 — PORTFOLIO DIVERSITY MANDATE. CellScore has 0 PRs merged across 20 RALPH cycles — the only active product with zero progress. Previous cycle explicitly promoted this to P1 and noted it MUST enter the pipeline this cycle. Well-scoped data seeding task: create 60+ plan records from 15+ carriers (T-Mobile, Verizon, AT&T, Mint, Visible, Cricket, etc.) with affiliate URLs. Scaffold is complete (v0.1.0, PostGIS DB). Revenue path: seed plan catalog with affiliate URLs → plan comparison page → user clicks → commission. No external dependencies.

selected_issues.title: [scorerebound] Servicer-specific recovery guide SEO pages — /guides/servicer/{slug}
selected_issues.reason: P0 — FEEDS EXISTING REVENUE FUNNEL. ScoreRebound's affiliate recommendation system shipped last cycle (PR #355 closed #349). Revenue chain is complete: quiz → recovery plan → affiliate cards → click → commission. What's missing: organic search traffic. These servicer-specific SEO pages capture high-intent queries like 'MOHELA student loan help', 'Navient credit recovery', 'NELNET default options'. Each page links to the recovery plan quiz → existing affiliate funnel. ScoreRebound has 23 PRs merged and a working product — SEO content is the multiplier that drives traffic to revenue.

housekeeping.reason: #349 closed by PR #355 (scorerebound affiliate recs). #274 closed by PR #354 (billwatch DB schema). #111 (afterloss Supabase schema) also confirmed closed — unblocks #253, #304, #256.
housekeeping.escalation_254: CRITICAL: #254 (afterloss checklist engine) has now failed 9 CONSECUTIVE worker assignments with zero PRs produced. Per escalation policy set in cycle 20, this issue MUST BE SPLIT by the planner into sub-issues before another worker attempt. Suggested split: (1) Zustand store setup + hydration fix, (2) Checklist data model + step definitions, (3) Checklist UI rendering + progress tracking, (4) localStorage persistence + sync. DO NOT assign #254 to another worker as-is — the monolithic scope is the root cause of failure.
